nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for writing a project constitution — a foundational document capturing guiding principles, non-negotiable constraints, and decision-making rules for a software project.

nodes.name: sample-spec.md
nodes.summary: Example feature specification demonstrating the spec-writer skill output format. Shows a filled-out spec with project overview, user scenarios, acceptance criteria, and implementation guidance.

nodes.name: spec-template.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification template for the spec-writer skill. Provides structured sections for project overview, user scenarios and stories with prioritization, acceptance criteria, and notes on independently testable MVP slices.
